# Example Usage

## Survival Model

### Model fitting main runner

python -m peph.cli.main run --config configs/ga_spatial_ttt.yml

### TTT delay contrast reference computations

python scripts/run_ttt_delay_contrast_reference.py --model .\data\dev\ga_spatial_ttt_cli\ga_spatial_ttt_cli_2026-03-08_180147\model.json --out-dir data/dev/reference_delay_demo --times 365,730,1825 --base-treat-times 30,60,90,180 --delay-days 30 --age-per10-centered 0.0 --cci 1 --tumor-size-log 3.5 --ses 0.0 --sex F --stage II --zip 30002 --n-boot 100

### TTT counterfactual reference computations

python scripts/run_ttt_counterfactual_reference.py --model .\data\dev\ga_spatial_ttt_cli\ga_spatial_ttt_cli_2026-03-08_180147\model.json --out-dir data/dev/reference_counterfactual_demo --times 365,730,1825 --treat-at-times 30,60,90,180 --age-per10-centered 0.0 --cci 1 --tumor-size-log 3.5 --ses 0.0 --sex F --stage II --zip 30002 --observed-treatment-time 75 --n-boot 100

### Model Sanity Check

python scripts/run_model_sanity_checks.py --run-dir .\data\dev\ga_spatial_ttt_cli\ga_spatial_ttt_cli_2026-03-08_180147\ --metadata-json .\data\ga_spatial_ttt_metadata.json

### Moran's I Spatial Frailty Check

python scripts/check_morans_i_frailty.py --run-dir .\data\dev\ga_spatial_ttt_cli\ga_spatial_ttt_cli_2026-03-08_174700\ --zips data/zips.csv --edges data/zip_adjacency.csv

## Treatment Model

### Running the treatment fit

python scripts/run_treatment_fit.py --data data/joint_ttt_survival_dataset.csv --out-dir models/treatment_fit --time-col treatment_time_obs --event-col treatment_event --x-numeric age_per10_centered,cci,ses --x-categorical sex,stage --reference-levels sex=F,stage=I --write-reference-predictions

## Utilities

### Generate TTT seerlike data for GA zips
###### Resulting data set can be used for both survival and treatment models

python scripts/generate_joint_ttt_survival_dataset.py

### Write long form data from a base csv

python scripts/write_long_from_wide.py --wide-csv data/joint_ttt_survival_dataset.csv --out-csv data/joint_ttt_survival_long.csv --breaks 0 30 90 180 365 730 1825

### Inspect long event structure

python scripts/check_long_event_structure.py --long-csv .\data\joint_ttt_survival_long.csv
